sections.title: After learning about the leprechaun before talking to the leprechaun

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So let me get this straight: I need to search the trees around here for a leprechaun; and then when I find him, he will tell me where this 'Zanaris' is?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: What? How did you know that? Uh... I mean, no, no you're very wrong. Very wrong, and not right at all, and I definitely didn't tell you about that at all.

sections.title: Dialogue after learning how to enter Zanaris

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you found anything yet?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: We're still searching for Zanaris...GAH! I mean we're not doing anything here at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't found it yet either.

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Hello there traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you camped here for?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: We're looking for Zanaris...GAH! I mean we're not here for any particular reason at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's Zanaris?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Ahahahaha! Zanaris isn't a person! It's a magical hidden city filled with treasures and rich.. uh, nothing. It's nothing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If it's hidden how are you planning to find it?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Well, we don't want to tell anyone else about that, because we don't want anyone else sharing in all that glory and treasure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, it looks to me like YOU don't know EITHER seeing as you're all just sat around here.

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Of course we know! We just haven't found which tree the stupid leprechaun's hiding in yet!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Leprechaun?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: GAH! I didn't mean to tell you that! Look, just forget I said anything okay?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So a leprechaun knows where Zanaris is eh?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Ye.. uh, no. No, not at all. And even if he did - which he doesn't - he DEFINITELY ISN'T hiding in some tree around here. Nope, definitely not. Honestly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the help!

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Help? What help? I didn't help! Please don't say I did, I'll get in trouble!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So let me get this straight: I need to search the trees around here for a leprechaun; and then when I find him, he will tell me where this 'Zanaris' is?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: What? How did you know that? Uh... I mean, no, no you're very wrong. Very wrong, and not right at all, and I definitely didn't tell you about that at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... Well good luck with it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's no such thing!

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: When we've found Zanaris you'll... GAH! I mean, we're not here for any particular reason at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's Zanaris?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: I don't think we want other people competing with us to find it. Forget I said anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well. Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What makes you think it's out here?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Don't you know of the legends that tell of the magical city, hidden in the swam... Uh, no, you're right, we're wasting our time here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know any good adventures I can go on?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Well we're on an adventure right now. Mind you, this is OUR adventure and we don't want to share it - find your own!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please tell me?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: PLEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEASE?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: NO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think you've found a good adventure at all!

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Hah! Adventurers of our calibre don't just hang around in forests for fun, whelp!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh really?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you camped here for?

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: We're looking for Zanaris...GAH! I mean we're not here for any particular reason at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, thanks for all the information. It REALLY helped me out in finding the lost city of Zanaris and all.

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Oh please don't say that anymore! If the rest of my party knew I'd helped you they'd probably throw me out and make me walk home by myself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know.... I think I'll keep that to myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, thanks for all the information. It REALLY helped me out in finding the lost city of Zanaris and all.

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: Oh please don't say that anymore! If the rest of my party knew I'd helped you they'd probably throw me out and make me walk home by myself!

lines.speaker: Warrior
lines.text: So anyway, what have you found out? Where is the fabled Zanaris? Is it all the legends say it is?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know.... I think I'll keep that to myself.
